title: Fireball Guard
description: This mod provides a trajectory previev when projectiles like fireballs and arrows are flying your way.
body:
# Fireball Guard: A Trajectory Mod

![Fireball Guard Banner (Steve being saved from being hit because of this mod)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/25MThKIR/images/e2eaaabb76147fdbeacee23f8d1bbfc5b6d7abc4.png)
## 📋 Overview:
<details>
<summary>🎮 Multiplayer</summary>

- This mod works in both single-player and multiplayer!

- **Important:** Confirm, that you are allowed to use this mod on the multiplayer server you are playing on, as it may be considered cheating.

</details>


<details>
<summary>❓ What It Does</summary>

This mod simulates the trajectories of shot projectiles like fireballs and arrows and shows you a preview of what path they will fly and where they will land, so you know, where you should not be.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🚀 Getting Started</summary>

1. Bind the "Toggle Fireball Guard" key from the "Fireball Guard" category to a key of your choice.
2. Click that key _(a text should now tell you whether you switched the mod on or off)_
3. Have fun with the mod!

</details>


## ⚙️ Technical:

<details>
<summary>❌ Does it not work like you want it to?</summary>

_The Mod has to be toggled_

### No text appears, when you press the button:

Did you set the _correct keybinds_? (The mod is unbound by default)

### The game crashes:

Do you have all dependencies installed? (Fabric API)
Did you download the correct _mod version_ for your _game version_?

### Something Unrelated?

Suggest a Feature: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Fireball-Guard/discussions/categories/ideas)

Request a Version: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Fireball-Guard/discussions/categories/versions)

Open an Issue: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Fireball-Guard/issues)

_(If your game crashes, please confirm, that the source of the Issue is this Mod)_

</details>

Mod adapted from hotpad100c's repository:
https://github.com/hotpad100c/Trajectory
